title: King Faisal Specialist Hospital Showcases Applied AI Ecosystem in Radiology at HLTH Europe 2026
description: AMSTERDAM, June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Professor Ahmad AbuSalah, PhD, Director of the Digital Innovation Hub at King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research Centre (KFSH), is presenting the hospital's model for building an applied artificial intelligence ecosystem in radiology during HLTH Europe 2026, taking place from June 15 to 18 in Amsterdam, highlighting how AI can move from clinical need to measurable impact through responsible governance, workflow integration, and human-centered adoption.

title: As Traditional SDE Hiring Slows, These 3 AI Programmes are best for a Career Switch to AI/ML Roles
description: New Delhi [India], June 16: For years, software development was one of the most reliable career pathways for engineering graduates and technology professionals. title: Readers sound off on integrating AI, Knicks history and Bill Ritter's Alzheimer's
description: Stamford, Conn.: Much has been written about the promise of artificial intelligence, but far less attention has been paid to its impact on recent college graduates entering the workforce. For many young people, obtaining that crucial first professional job has become increasingly difficult as employers adopt AI tools capable of performing tasks once assigned to entry-level employees.

title: France Bets Big on AI: €655 Million Investment Announced
description: French Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu has announced a government investment of €655 million in artificial intelligence. This move includes plans to establish a unified chatbot for state services, emphasizing France's commitment to advancing its AI capabilities and ensuring streamlined service delivery across government platforms.

title: AI Investor Rush: Sandisk gains as investors chase AI winners
description: Sandisk shares jumped sharply as investors continued pouring money into companies tied to the expanding artificial intelligence ecosystem. The stock gained momentum alongside other memory and storage firms as markets focused on the enormous infrastructure investments required to support next-generation AI applications. Demand for high-performance memory solutions remains a key driver of investor enthusiasm. (Sources: Yahoo Finance,Simply Wall St, Reuters) ​Sandisk Rides the AI Infrastructure Wave

title: Why Gen Z is falling in love with DIY cyberdecks, AI-free search engines and distraction-free gadgets?
description: As artificial intelligence becomes a bigger part of everyday life, a growing number of Gen Z users are embracing simpler, more intentional technology. From DIY cyberdecks and refurbished iPods to AI-free search engines, many young people are seeking greater privacy, creativity, focus and control in an increasingly algorithm-driven world.
